name: browser-use
description: Browser Use plugins for Claude Code.

plugins.name: browser-use
plugins.description: Direct browser control via CDP with the Browser Use CLI 3.0 — Claude drives your real Chrome or a Browser Use cloud browser through short Python snippets: coordinate clicks, screenshots, navigation, DOM extraction, raw CDP. Ships the browser-use skill from the browser-use library; the CLI is a one-time install (uv tool install --python 3.12 browser-use).

plugins.name: qa
plugins.description: QA-test a website or app and return a 1-5 quality score with evidence. Drives a Browser Use cloud browser and tunnels localhost automatically. Run as /qa <url-or-localhost-port>. Requires the browser-harness CLI (the skill installs it itself if missing).
